LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR JUDICIAL APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC. AND DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED BUILDING ENTERPRISES, INC. THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 20, 2007. COUNSEL IS TO PROVIDE THE REQUESTED INFORMATION PRIOR TO THAT DATE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MUST SUPPLEMENT THE RECORD TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE FEES REQUESTED ARE CONSISTENT WITH MARKET RATES FOR LAWYERS WITH COMPARABLE EXPERIENCE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAVE NOT DEMONSTRATED HOW THE PAYMENT IN LIEU OF A CIVIL PENALTY WILL BE SPENT FOR A PROPER, DESIGNATED PURPOSE, HOW THE RECIPIENT WAS SELECTED, WHETHER IT IS APPROPRIATE FOR PLAINTIFF TO SELECT ITSELF AND WHAT PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO INSURE ACCOUNTABILITY. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Continued To Sep-20-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: MOTION FOR JUDICIAL APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC. AND DEFENDANT ASSOCIATED BUILDING ENTERPRISES, INC.
APPEARANCES: REUBEN YEROUSHALMI, ESQUIRE (YEROUSHALMI & ASSOCIATES, 213.382.3183) APPEARING THROUGH COURTCALL ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARNCES.
RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 20, 2007. COUNSEL IS TO PROVIDE THE REQUESTED INFORMATION PRIOR TO THAT DATE. PLAINTIF'S COUNSEL MUST SUPPLEMENT THE RECORD TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE FEES REQUESTED ARE CONSISTENT WITH MARKET RATES FOR LAWYERS WITH COMPARABLE EXPERIENCE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAVE NOT DEMONSTRATED HOW THE PAYMENT IN LIEU OF A CIVIL PENALTY WILL BE SPENT FOR A PROPER, DESIGNATED PURPOSE, HOW THE RECIPIENT WAS SELECTED, WHETHER IT IS APPROPRIATE FOR PLAINTIFF TO SELECT ITSELF AND WHAT PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO INSURE ACCOUNTABILITY. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
